FR-01.title: Patient Onboarding
requirements: Register with personal and insurance details
Health questionnaire and medical history form

FR-02.title: Doctor Search and Selection
requirements: Search doctors by specialty, language, and availability
View doctor profile with credentials and reviews
Sort by rating and next available slot

FR-03.title: Video Consultation
requirements: HD video call between patient and doctor
Screen sharing for reports and images

FR-04.title: Appointment Scheduling
requirements: Urgent care queue for immediate consultations
Appointment reminders via SMS and email

FR-05.title: E-Prescription
requirements: Prescriptions sent to patient's preferred pharmacy

FR-07.title: Payment and Insurance
requirements: Payment receipt and claim status tracking

FR-08.title: Chat Messaging
requirements: Chat available before and after consultation

FR-09.title: Health Monitoring Integration
requirements: Connect wearable devices for vital signs
Display heart rate, BP, glucose trends

FR-01.title: Plan Patient Onboarding Workflow and Contracts
FR-01.description: Review the SRS requirement bullets for patient onboarding and break them into executable API, UI, data, security, and reporting subtasks. Define the workflow states, user roles, field-level validations, request/response contracts, and failure cases before implementation starts. Use these requirement drivers as the baseline: Register with personal and insurance details; Health questionnaire and medical history form; ID verification for identity confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end workflow for patient onboarding is documented from trigger to completion
Validation rules, role restrictions, and error scenarios for patient onboarding are explicitly defined
Implementation subtasks for patient onboarding can be picked up independently by engineering

FR-01.title: Implement Patient Onboarding Backend Services
FR-01.description: Build the backend services for patient onboarding on React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, WebRTC. Create route handlers or service endpoints, model the core business operations, enforce validation and authorization rules, persist workflow state changes, and add structured error handling and audit logging. Make sure the implementation covers these behaviors: Register with personal and insurance details; Health questionnaire and medical history form; ID verification for identity confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: Core patient onboarding business rules are implemented for Telemedicine Platform
Validation, authorization, and error handling are covered for patient onboarding
API/service behavior for patient onboarding is testable and documented for integration

FR-01.title: Implement Patient Onboarding Frontend Flow
FR-01.description: Build the frontend flow for patient onboarding with the exact forms, tables, filters, wizards, status indicators, and action buttons required by the SRS. Connect the UI to the backend contract, handle optimistic updates or refresh flows where needed, and provide user-facing validation, permissions feedback, loading states, and recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: The patient onboarding user flow is accessible and responsive across supported browsers
Forms, filters, tables, and feedback states for patient onboarding behave correctly
The patient onboarding UI is fully integrated with backend APIs and handles loading and error states

FR-01.title: Design Patient Onboarding Persistence Model
FR-01.description: Design the persistence layer for patient onboarding. Identify the core entities, relationships, indexes, status fields, history/audit tables, and reporting attributes required to support the workflow. Add migrations and seed or fixture data where that helps engineering validate the feature early.
acceptance_criteria: The persistence model for patient onboarding supports required workflows and reporting needs
Indexes, constraints, and relationships for patient onboarding are defined correctly
Migrations for patient onboarding can be applied safely in target environments

FR-01.title: Build Patient Onboarding Reporting and KPI Logic
FR-01.description: Implement the reporting layer for patient onboarding, including aggregate queries, KPI calculations, filters, drill-down behavior, and export-ready payloads. Ensure data shown in dashboards or reports can be traced back to transactional records and remains performant at realistic dataset sizes.
acceptance_criteria: KPI and reporting calculations for patient onboarding return accurate results
Filters, grouping, and export-ready structures for patient onboarding work correctly
Reporting queries for patient onboarding perform within acceptable limits

FR-01.title: Write Patient Onboarding Automated and End-to-End Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for patient onboarding. Cover valid flows, invalid inputs, permission failures, state transitions, data integrity checks, and regression-prone edge cases pulled from the SRS. Add fixtures or mocks that make the feature verifiable in CI and local development.
acceptance_criteria: Happy path and failure cases for patient onboarding are covered by automated tests
Permission checks and validation rules for patient onboarding are verified
Regression coverage exists for the most critical patient onboarding scenarios
